goal: Create /World/Bubble (sphere r=0.3 at (1,1,1)), verify it exists, delete it, verify it's gone. Reply must cite both verify steps.
thoughts: Verify-before-claim pattern explicit: the task forces the agent to not just do-then-describe but do-verify-do-verify. The two prim_exists calls produce concrete evidence the reply can cite.
failure_modes: Skipping the second prim_exists — the reply 'then deleted' is an unverified claim; verify-contract should flag it.
Describing the deletion before running it — fabrication.
Calling prim_exists ONCE at the end — loses the 'exists=True before deletion' half of the proof.
